fields.summary: MQRST6789L - Mandate activation failing invalid account
fields.description: Customer unable to activate mandate. Error: Invalid Account No.

analysis.summary: MQRST6789L - Mandate activation failing invalid account
analysis.description: Customer unable to activate mandate. Error: Invalid Account No.

comments.body: check_account_validation_history showed Axis Bank account number mismatch: expected 15-16 digits, received 10. Axis Bank requires leading zeros. Data team fixed account number by padding with leading zeros.
comments.author: support-agent@fundsindia.com
